name: Hershey's 50% Reduced Fat Chocolate-Orange Cake
recipeIngredient: 12 oz 50% Reduced Fat Chocolate Chips (HERSHEY'S Semi Sweet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 13x9x2-inch baking pan with vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, stir together brown sugar, margarine, and egg whites.
4. Add skim milk and orange juice; mix until combined.
5. Stir in flour, oats, orange peel, baking soda, salt, and chocolate chips.
6. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until lightly golden brown and firm when touched gently.
8. Allow cake to cool completely.
15 servings.
Nutrition Facts per serving: Calories 300, Fat 72, Total Fat 10g (15% DV), Saturated Fat 6g (30% DV), Cholesterol 0mg (0% DV), Sodium 220mg (9% DV), Total Carbohydrates 51g (17% DV), Dietary Fiber 3g (12% DV), Sugars 29g, Protein 6g.
Contains 4.5g of Salatrim per serving, providing 8g of available total fat.
Contains 3.5g of Salatrim per serving, providing 2.5g of available total fat.
